description: Chemical Process Pump designed to exceed ASME B73.1 criteria, featuring a reverse vane impeller for unmatched performance and reliability.
differentiators: Reverse vane impeller for predictable, repeatable seal chamber pressure
SealSentry seal chamber technology for extended seal life
Micrometer radial bearing adjustment for precise impeller setting

description: ANSI Standard Centrifugal Process Pump, recognized as the industry standard for chemical and industrial process applications.
differentiators: i-FRAME power end with condition monitoring
Fully open impeller for solids handling capability
Heavy duty shaft and bearings for continuous service

description: Single-stage centrifugal end-suction process pump optimized for demanding industrial applications including chemical and pulp & paper processes.
differentiators: Patented Water-Saving WRS shaft seal option
High-efficiency hydraulic design reducing energy consumption
Heavy-duty construction optimized for continuous reliability
